name: Turkey Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine in a saucepan the spaghetti sauce mix, tomato paste, and half a can of tomato paste with water. Stir until combined.
2. Add oregano and mushrooms; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. In a separate bowl, combine turkey, milk, bread crumbs, garlic salt, and pepper.
5. Press the turkey mixture evenly over the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
6. Spoon the spaghetti sauce evenly into the meat crust; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese; bake an additional 15 minutes.
9. Cool slightly and cut into wedges to serve.
